assignments.description: Stamps NumberOfEmployees onto the trigger record so the calling Apex action can verify a second TRG_InvokeFlow CMDT record fired alongside the primary one.
assignments.name: StampAdditionalDefaults
assignments.label: Stamp Additional Defaults

Flow.description: Subscriber-namespace test flow used by the flow-as-trigger-action release-testing Phase 5B for the recursion-identity assertion. Bound to a second TriggerAction__mdt row alongside TST_SubscriberFlow_SetDefaults so the calling Apex can verify both records fire on the same trigger event. Sets NumberOfEmployees=42 to leave a distinct fingerprint from the primary flow's Description / AccountSource writes.
Flow.label: TST Subscriber Flow Additional Defaults

variables.description: Trigger record passed in by kern.TRG_InvokeFlow. Mutated in place; the calling Apex copies populated fields back onto Trigger.new.
variables.name: record

variables.description: Pre-update record passed in by kern.TRG_InvokeFlow on update events. Read-only; not used by this flow.
variables.name: recordPrior
